description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a manicured yard and enclosed by a dark fence. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by two garage doors and a pathway leading to the main entrance. The roof is complex, with multiple intersecting gable sections and a mix of shingle textures. The rear of the house includes a spacious patio area with railings and a large expanse of lawn, while the sides are bordered by flower beds, shrubs, and several mature trees. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large panes and some decorative grilles. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines, muted colors, and a focus on curb appeal.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a complex gable roof, large windows, a front porch, and landscaped yard enclosed by a dark fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, covered porch, and landscaped walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area, extensive lawn, and multiple roof levels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio with railings, wide windows, and open backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible patio, side entry, and lush garden beds.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped panes
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, double doors, decorative columns, and landscaped approach
